memberdef.type: std::pair< std::shared_ptr< ISecureStorage >, std::pair< KeyGenerator::ElGamal, ethereum::EthereumKeyGenerator > >
memberdef.name: StorageWithAddress

briefdescription.para: Expected size of the signature in bytes.
Whether this account is a full node.
Map of the confirmed nonces from peers.
Condition variable for waiting on nonce requests.
Flag indicating if a nonce request is in progress.
Timestamp when cached nonce was obtained.

memberdef.name: New

parameterdescription.para: Ethereum private key in hex format (0x...).
Whether to initialize as a full node.

simplesect.para: Valid pointer if succeeds, nullptr otherwise.

memberdef.name: New

memberdef.name: VerifySignature

briefdescription.para: Verify a signature using the Genius account's public key.

parameterdescription.para: public address to verify the signature

simplesect.para: true if the signature is valid, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Initialize the messenger for the account.

parameterdescription.para: GlobalDB instance used to store fetched block CIDs.

simplesect.para: true if successfully configured, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get the confirmed nonce as a string.

simplesect.para: The confirmed nonce in string format

briefdescription.para: Sign data using the Genius account's private key.

simplesect.para: the signature as a vector of bytes

parameterdescription.para: The nonce value to be set

briefdescription.para: Set the local confirmed nonce for a peer.

parameterdescription.para: The nonce value to be set

briefdescription.para: Rollback the local confirmed nonce for a peer.

parameterdescription.para: The nonce value to be rolled back to

briefdescription.para: Get the confirmed nonce for a peer.

simplesect.para: The confirmed nonce of the peer if exists, error otherwise
The local confirmed nonce if exists, error otherwise

briefdescription.para: Get confirmed nonce from the network.

parameterdescription.para: Timeout in miliseconds to get the confirmed nonce

simplesect.para: The confirmed nonce if success, error otherwise

briefdescription.para: Get the next available nonce without reserving it.

simplesect.para: The nonce that would be assigned to the next transaction

memberdef.argsstring: (uint64_t timeout_ms=8000, std::function< void(outcome::result< std::string >)> callback=nullptr) const

simplesect.para: outcome::success if request was sent, error otherwise
